name: Anton Kariskau
title: Full Stack Developer & AI Specialist
summary: Passionate and innovative software developer with 5+ years of experience building scalable web applications, AI-powered solutions, and modern cloud architectures. Expertise in full-stack development, machine learning integration, and agile methodologies. Proven track record of delivering high-impact projects that drive business growth and user satisfaction.

experience.title: Senior Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Lead development of enterprise web applications using React, Node.js, and AWS. Implemented CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time by 60%. Mentored team of 5 junior developers.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Built RESTful APIs and microservices architecture. Optimized database queries improving performance by 40%. Collaborated with cross-functional teams in agile environment.

projects.name: AI-Powered CV Generator Bot
projects.description: Telegram bot that generates professional CVs using AI and custom PDF templates. Features 20-color premium design and multiple template options.

projects.name: E-Commerce Platform
